Usage:

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  solution  Creates a new solution
  project   Creates a new project

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a new project

Usage:
  Ayasuna.Frostseek new project [options]

Options:
  --name <name>                     The name of the new project
  --solution <solution>             The solution to add the new project to
  --type <Main|Meta|Test>           Determines the type of project that should be created [default: Main]
  --target <target>                 The directory in which to create the project (relative to the default project directory of the selected type) [default: .]
  --template <Application|Library>  Determines the template that should be applied when creating the project [default: Library]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a new solution

Usage:
  Ayasuna.Frostseek new solution [options]

Options:
  --name <name>                   The name of the new solution
  --target <target>               The directory to create the solution in [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-ayasuna.frostseek-1.8.0-eb8cd887e24140d591619ce6d04bf4f8]
  --git                           Determines if a git repository should be initialized [default: True]
  --copyright-license <MIT|None>  Determines the copyright licenses that should be added to the new solution [default: None]
  --documentation <Docsify|None>  Determines the documentation type that should be initialized for the new solution [default: Docsify]
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
